response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, but the role requires a Director-level IC with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. Tenure is closer to 11-13 years post-graduation, and there is no evidence of leading AI platform strategy, advising strategic customers, or building recognized AI products at the scale this Principal role demands.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Demonstrated thought leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No Director-level or Principal IC track record; highest title is Staff Software Engineer with limited strategic leadership scope
Lacks recognized AI/ML expertise, advanced AI degree, or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
No evidence of cloud platform strategy work or advising strategic enterprise customers on cutting-edge adoption

key_factors.factor: Missing Principal/Director-level AI strategy track record
No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI platforms
Recent MCP and AI-agent tooling exposure
